options.content:
Audits monitoring and observability tools deployed across clusters, showing CPU and memory resource consumption. Enables comparison between the current monitoring landscape and the GiantSwarm observability platform to support consolidation conversations.

**GiantSwarm components:** management cluster (all namespaces) · workload cluster `kube-system`  
**Customer components:** workload cluster namespaces outside `kube-system`  
**Detected tools:** DataDog, Instana, Prometheus, Alertmanager, Alloy, New Relic, Elastic/APM, Dynatrace, Grafana, Mimir, Loki, Tempo, Pyroscope, Beyla, OpenTelemetry, VictoriaMetrics, Vector, Fluent Bit, Fluentd, Promtail, Telegraf

targets.expr:
sort_desc(sum by (tool) (
  label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*datadog.*"}, "tool", "DataDog", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*instana.*"}, "tool", "Instana", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(prometheus|alertmanager).*"}, "tool", "Prometheus", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*alloy.*"}, "tool", "Alloy", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*newrelic.*"}, "tool", "New Relic", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(elastic|apm-server|metricbeat|filebeat|logstash|kibana).*"}, "tool", "Elastic / APM", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*dynatrace.*"}, "tool", "Dynatrace", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*grafana.*"}, "tool", "Grafana", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*mimir.*"}, "tool", "Mimir", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*loki.*"}, "tool", "Loki", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*tempo.*"}, "tool", "Tempo", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*pyroscope.*"}, "tool", "Pyroscope", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*beyla.*"}, "tool", "Beyla", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(otel|opentelemetry).*"}, "tool", "OpenTelemetry", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(victoriametrics|vmagent|vmalert|vminsert|vmselect|vmstorage|vmsingle).*"}, "tool", "VictoriaMetrics", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*vector.*"}, "tool", "Vector", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(fluent-bit|fluentbit).*"}, "tool", "Fluent Bit", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*fluentd.*"}, "tool", "Fluentd", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*promtail.*"}, "tool", "Promtail", "pod", ".*")
  or label_replace(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace!="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*telegraf.*"}, "tool", "Telegraf", "pod", ".*")
))

panels.title: Customer Workload Clusters — Detected Monitoring Tool Pods
panels.description: Pods matching known monitoring tool patterns in customer-controlled namespaces. Sorted by CPU desc, memory desc, then cluster / namespace / pod. Use the all-namespaces bar gauges below to spot tools not captured here.

panels.title: Efficiency — Detected Monitoring Tools (Customer Workload Clusters)
Customer Monitoring Tools — Actual CPU vs Requested
Customer Monitoring Tools — Actual Memory vs Requested
All Customer Namespaces — Catch-all (spot undetected tools)
